name: @invisable/security-crypto
description: INVISABLE Guardian + PWA encryption/hashing layer — established libraries only, no custom crypto.

comments.pinning: Crypto libraries are pinned to EXACT versions (no ^/~). The Guardian crypto-policy checker enforces this. Bumps go through review + scanning.

//optionalDependencies: E2EE via @signalapp/libsignal-client is installed ON DEMAND when E2EE is enabled (e2eeMessaging.ts lazy-loads it). It is not a default dependency because its transitive uuid<11 pulls a known CVE; pin a patched version when you add it.
